_comment: Ported from frvnkfrmchicago-threads.json — brand voice + Threads flow preserved; trigger changed to publish-event webhook. Receives a draft from the threads-broadcast Edge Function (text already generated by Gemini 2.0 Flash in Frank's voice) and runs the Threads API container → 30s wait → publish sequence.
name: assetpersona-threads-broadcast

_variables.THREADS_FRVNK_USER_ID: Reuse the same value from the existing frvnkfrmchicago-threads workflow.
_variables.THREADS_FRVNK_TOKEN: Reuse the same long-lived Threads access token from the existing frvnkfrmchicago-threads workflow. Refreshed via Meta's standard 60-day token rotation — banned: hardcoding shorter tokens.
_variables.N8N_HMAC_SECRET: Shared secret with assetpersona Supabase Edge Functions. Same value as the inquiry-router workflow uses.
